expectations.text: The output includes a structured JSON animation plan
expectations.evidence: No JSON plan — only a code snippet with brief text

expectations.text: The output includes a Blender Python script
expectations.evidence: A basic bpy script is provided inline

expectations.text: The script creates a rocket-like object (cone + cylinder or similar composite)
expectations.evidence: Creates a cylinder body and cone nose, but they are not parented together

expectations.text: The script includes a ground plane
The script uses particle systems or volumetrics for smoke/fire effects
expectations.evidence: No particle system — output says 'For smoke effects you'd need to set up a smoke domain manually'

expectations.text: The script animates the rocket moving upward with keyframes
expectations.evidence: Body and nose animated separately with different keyframes — they'd move out of sync without parenting

expectations.text: The script includes a camera that tracks or follows the rocket
expectations.evidence: No camera setup — output says 'The camera can be configured through the Blender UI'
